ExampleDocs API

ExampleDocs provides a REST API for managing users, teams, and projects. All endpoints return JSON and require token-based authentication.

Quick Example

Fetch a list of users with a single request:

curl -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN" \
  https://api.example.com/v2/users

Response Format

FieldTypeDescription
idstringUnique user identifier
emailstringUser email address
created_atstringISO 8601 creation timestamp
